name: EAMEnrlRptBaseExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_base AS ( SELECT t.TransID AS TRANS_ID, t.TransCode AS TRANS_CODE, ts.Description AS TRANS_STATUS, t.MemCodNum AS MEMBER_CD_NUM, ISNULL(t.ReplyCodes,' ') AS CMS_RESEPONSE_CD, cd.ShortDefinition AS CMS_RESPONSE_SHORTDESC, m.MemberID AS MEMBER_ID, t.HIC AS MBI, t.PlanID AS PLAN_ID, p.PlanName AS PLAN_NM, t.PBPID AS PBP_ID, mi.LastName AS LAST_NAME, mi.FirstName AS FIRST_NAME, mi.MI AS MIDDLE_INIT, mi.SCC1 AS COUNTY_CD, mi.State AS STATE_CD, es.Description AS MEDIA_SOURCE, CASE WHEN t.TransCode!='76' THEN t.EffectiveDate ELSE ta.EffectiveDateAddress END AS EFF_DT, CASE WHEN m.ProgramSource<>2 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'CONVERTED ACTIVE' END AS MEMBER_STATUS, t.ApplicationDate AS PLAN_RECEIPT_DT, t.DateCreated AS TMG_RECEIPT_DT, t.ReceiptDate AS APPLICATION_DT, t.DateSubmitted AS CMS_SUBMISSION_DT, t.FinalResponseDate AS FINAL_RESPONSE_DT, l.txtCodeValue AS PROGRAM_SOURCE, t.CompleteDate AS RFI_COMPLETE_DT, r.Description AS DISENROLL_REASON, t.CMSResponse AS CMS_RESPONSE_TYPE, sr.Repname AS SALES_REP_NAME, sr.SalesRepID AS SALES_REP_ID, t.ForceDenyApp, t.Incomplete FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbTransactions t JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbEENRLMembers m ON m.MemCodNum=t.MemCodNum JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbMemberInfo mi ON mi.MemCodNum=m.MemCodNum JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbPlans p ON t.PlanID=p.PlanID LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbTransactionAddress ta ON t.TransID=ta.TransID LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbTRRCode cd ON t.ReplyCodes=cd.Code LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbTransStatus ts ON t.TransStatus=ts.Status LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbEnrollmentSources es ON t.EnrollSource=es.EnrollSourceID LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbDisenrollReasons r ON r.DisenrolCode=CONVERT(varchar(20),t.DisenrollmentReason) LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbLookup l ON l.txtCode=t.ProgramSource AND l.txtTable='tbTransactions' AND l.txtColumn='ProgramSource' LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbENRLSpans sp ON t.MemCodNum=sp.MemCodNum AND t.PlanID=sp.PlanID AND t.PBPID=sp.Value AND t.EffectiveDate BETWEEN sp.StartDate AND sp.EndDate LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.SalesReps sr ON t.SalesRepID=sr.SalesRepID WHERE t.EffectiveDate>='2020-10-01' AND (t.ReceiptDate IS NULL OR t.ReceiptDate>='2020-10-01') ), cte_brules AS ( SELECT cte_base.*, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.TRANS_CODE,''))) AS svTransCd, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.TRANS_STATUS,''))) AS svTransStatus, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.CMS_RESEPONSE_CD,''))) AS svCmsRespCd, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.CMS_RESPONSE_SHORTDESC,''))) AS svCmsRespDesc, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.MBI,''))) AS svMBI, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.PLAN_ID,''))) AS svPlanID, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.PLAN_NM,''))) AS svPlanName, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.PBP_ID,''))) AS svPbpID, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.LAST_NAME,''))) AS svLName, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.FIRST_NAME,''))) AS svFName, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.MIDDLE_INIT,''))) AS svMI, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.COUNTY_CD,''))) AS svCnty, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.STATE_CD,''))) AS svSt, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.MEDIA_SOURCE,''))) AS svMediaSrc, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.MEMBER_STATUS,''))) AS svMbrSts, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.PROGRAM_SOURCE,''))) AS svPrgmSrc, LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_base.DISENROLL_REASON,''))) AS svDisEnrollRsn FROM cte_base ), cte_final AS ( SELECT cte_brules.TRANS_ID AS TRANS_ID, cte_brules.svTransCd AS TRANS_CODE, cte_brules.svTransStatus AS TRANS_STATUS, cte_brules.MEMBER_CD_NUM AS MEMBER_CD_NUM, cte_brules.svCmsRespCd AS CMS_RESPONSE_CD, cte_brules.svCmsRespDesc AS CMS_RESPONSE_SHORTDESC, LTRIM(RTRIM(cte_brules.MEMBER_ID)) AS MEMBER_ID, cte_brules.svMBI AS MBI, cte_brules.svPlanID AS PLAN_ID, cte_brules.svPlanName AS PLAN_NM, cte_brules.svPbpID AS PBP_ID, cte_brules.svLName AS LAST_NAME, cte_brules.svFName AS FIRST_NAME, cte_brules.svMI AS MIDDLE_INIT, cte_brules.svCnty AS COUNTY_CD, cte_brules.svSt AS STATE_CD, cte_brules.svMediaSrc AS MEDIA_SOURCE, CASE WHEN cte_brules.EFF_DT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cte_brules.EFF_DT AS date) END AS EFF_DT, NULL AS TERM_DT, cte_brules.svMbrSts AS MEMBER_STATUS, CASE WHEN cte_brules.PLAN_RECEIPT_DT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cte_brules.PLAN_RECEIPT_DT AS date) END AS PLAN_RECEIPT_DT, CASE WHEN cte_brules.TMG_RECEIPT_DT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cte_brules.TMG_RECEIPT_DT AS date) END AS TMG_RECEIPT_DT, CASE WHEN cte_brules.APPLICATION_DT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cte_brules.APPLICATION_DT AS date) END AS APPLICATION_DT, CASE WHEN cte_brules.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cte_brules.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT AS date) END AS CMS_SUBMISSION_DT, NULL AS CONFIRMED_ENROLLMENT_DT, NULL AS CONFIRMED_PLAN_CHANGE_DT, CASE WHEN cte_brules.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cte_brules.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT AS date) END AS FINAL_RESPONSE_DT, NULL AS ACK_ENROLLMENT_DT, cte_brules.svPrgmSrc AS PROGRAM_SOURCE, 'OEC / CMS' AS APPLICATION_DESC, NULL AS RFI_ENROLLMENT_DT, NULL AS NOTICE_RETIREE_DRUG_SUBSIDY_DT, NULL AS ENROLLMENT_DENIAL_DT, NULL AS ENROLLMENT_REJECTION_DT, NULL AS ACK_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS RFI_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS CONFIRMED_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS DENIAL_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS REJECTION_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS CONFIRMED_DISENROLL_PASSIVE_DT, NULL AS CORRECTION_OF_DEATH_STATUS_DT, NULL AS INVOLUNTARY_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS ACK_CANCEL_ENROLL_DT, NULL AS CONFIRMED_REINSTATEMENT_DT, NULL AS CONFIRMED_CANCEL_ENROLL_DT, NULL AS ACK_CANCEL_DISENROLL_DT, NULL AS ENROLLMENT_STATUS_UPDATE_DT, NULL AS DISENROLL_INCARCERATION_DT, NULL AS MBR_ID_CARD_DT, cte_brules.svDisEnrollRsn AS DISENROLL_REASON, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDt}' AS date) AS PROCESS_RUN_DT, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_brules.CMS_RESPONSE_TYPE,'')))='' THEN NULL ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(cte_brules.CMS_RESPONSE_TYPE)) END AS CMS_RESPONSE_TYPE, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cte_brules.SALES_REP_NAME,'')))='' THEN NULL ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(cte_brules.SALES_REP_NAME)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME, cte_brules.SALES_REP_ID AS SALES_REP_ID, cte_brules.ForceDenyApp AS FRC_DNY_APP_IND, cte_brules.Incomplete AS INCMPLT_IND FROM cte_brules ), cte_rmdup AS ( SELECT cte_final.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cte_final.TRANS_ID ORDER BY cte_final.TRANS_ID) AS rn FROM cte_final ) SELECT TRANS_ID, TRANS_CODE, TRANS_STATUS, MEMBER_CD_NUM, CMS_RESPONSE_CD, CMS_RESPONSE_SHORTDESC, MEMBER_ID, MBI, PLAN_ID, PLAN_NM, PBP_ID, LAST_NAME, FIRST_NAME, MIDDLE_INIT, COUNTY_CD, STATE_CD, MEDIA_SOURCE, EFF_DT, TERM_DT, MEMBER_STATUS, PLAN_RECEIPT_DT, TMG_RECEIPT_DT, APPLICATION_DT, CMS_SUBMISSION_DT, CONFIRMED_ENROLLMENT_DT, CONFIRMED_PLAN_CHANGE_DT, FINAL_RESPONSE_DT, ACK_ENROLLMENT_DT, PROGRAM_SOURCE, APPLICATION_DESC, RFI_ENROLLMENT_DT, NOTICE_RETIREE_DRUG_SUBSIDY_DT, ENROLLMENT_DENIAL_DT, ENROLLMENT_REJECTION_DT, ACK_DISENROLL_DT, RFI_DISENROLL_DT, CONFIRMED_DISENROLL_DT, DENIAL_DISENROLL_DT, REJECTION_DISENROLL_DT, CONFIRMED_DISENROLL_PASSIVE_DT, CORRECTION_OF_DEATH_STATUS_DT, INVOLUNTARY_DISENROLL_DT, ACK_CANCEL_ENROLL_DT, CONFIRMED_REINSTATEMENT_DT, CONFIRMED_CANCEL_ENROLL_DT, ACK_CANCEL_DISENROLL_DT, ENROLLMENT_STATUS_UPDATE_DT, DISENROLL_INCARCERATION_DT, MBR_ID_CARD_DT, DISENROLL_REASON, PROCESS_RUN_DT, CMS_RESPONSE_TYPE, SALES_REP_NAME, SALES_REP_ID, FRC_DNY_APP_IND, INCMPLT_IND FROM cte_rmdup WHERE rn=1

Description:
Calling Job: EAMEnrollmentOpsRptCntl

This Job extracts data from EAM and other databases to attach the attributes for Enrollment Operations Reportcordingly.

Annotations:
This Job extracts data from EAM and other databases to attach the attributes for Enrollment Operations Report
When a member enrolls, retain the first trasaction id(lower number) since that record is conuted for Numbr of days for compliance
Remove the Duplicates on TRANS_ID
